description: Documentation generation and migration. Reads code, extracts signatures and patterns, produces readable docs with migration guides.

self_check_steps: All public API items are documented
Examples compile or are syntactically valid
Migration steps are ordered and reversible
No TODO or placeholder text remains

behavior_rules.rule: Derive documentation from actual source code — never guess signatures
behavior_rules.rationale: Stale docs are worse than no docs

behavior_rules.rule: Include at least one working example per documented function/module
Flag deprecated or unstable APIs with clear warnings
Keep migration guides step-by-step with rollback instructions
behavior_rules.rationale: Migration docs must be safe to follow

inject_on_spawn.description: Existing documentation to update or migrate from
Project documentation standards and style guide

conditions: Migration guide (if applicable) complete with rollback steps
README or index updated to link to new docs

artifacts_expected.description: Full API reference with signatures, descriptions, and examples
Migration guide if breaking changes exist (optional, only if needed)

triggers: source code uses patterns the model cannot confidently document
migration involves more than 3 crates with cross-dependencies
output exceeds max_size_kb and pruning is not straightforward
